name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine pinch—too late?
description: No, doctor link allows late reporting[1][4].

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine pinch—too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, doctor link allows late reporting[1][4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if linked to accident by doctor.** Delayed injuries common, report anyway[4]. **Key factors:** Medical causation proof. **Practical guidance:** See specialist; document timeline. Utah accepts if work-related[1].
